goal: Enable agent-driven local Categorizer launch for Cursor browser UAT probes (US-0006). Create standalone docker-compose.local.yml, populate .cursor/dev-environment.json, create .env.example, dev-launch script, runbook documentation, browser UAT probe integration, and user guide.
risks: L1: Port 3001 already in use (Low/Medium — document in user guide troubleshooting)
L2: .env missing when agent runs start_command (Medium/High — dev-environment.json declares required_env_vars; agent pre-checks)
L3: Container doesn't start — image build failure (Low/Medium — document --build flag)
L4: Health GET / returns non-200 during startup (Medium/Medium — start_period 20s grace; agent polls 60s cap)
L5: Agent and operator both run local compose — port conflict (Low/Low — restart: no + explicit lifecycle)
L6: BUG-0002 runtime — /api/reviews may return HTML 404 on stale deployment; agent must not JSON SyntaxError
